items.title: Jaren Jackson Jr. 🤝 Carlos Boozer
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Jaren Jackson Jr. 🤝 Carlos Boozer

The current and former Utah Jazz players linked up as Carlos supported his son Cam in his Salt Lake City Summer League debut with Memphis!

items.title: Dallas acquires a versatile forward as Memphis continues to stack draft capital. The deal also allows the Grizzlies to preserve its full $29 million trade exception from the Jaren Jackson Jr. trade, which otherwise would have been reduced by their earlier offseason dealings.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Dallas acquires a versatile forward as Memphis continues to stack draft capital. The deal also allows the Grizzlies to preserve its full $29 million trade exception from the Jaren Jackson Jr. trade, which otherwise would have been reduced by their earlier offseason dealings.

items.title: Isaiah Stewart II will go into either the NTMLE as a TPE (more likely) or the Jaren Jackson Jr TPE (less likely) for the Grizzlies.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Isaiah Stewart II will go into either the NTMLE as a TPE (more likely) or the Jaren Jackson Jr TPE (less likely) for the Grizzlies.

This could be a sign the Detroit Pistons are gearing up to go the cap space route this offseason. Something to keep an eye on!
